title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises:
Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises!
